content_of_post_to_comment: As a healing codependent, I try to diversify my connections. Keep a friend here, a friend there, a new activity that I enjoy, and a bunch of solo activities. How does everyone else support themselves when healing from codependency?
comment: Diversifying helps, but it can also keep every bond slightly non-essential, so nothing ever triggers real dependency anxiety. Maybe healing is also learning to stay when one connection starts to feel 'too important'.
